attributes.action: Abolish daylight savings time in the UK
attributes.additional_details:
Abolish daylight savings time in the UK.
The process of losing or gaining an hour has no benefit to energy consumption. 
It has no benefit to farmers because cows can't tell the time. 
The time changing has a detrimental impact on circadian rhythm.
It is out dated and pointless
attributes.background:
Stop the twice yearly change of the clocks.
Keep GMT all year round.

rejection.details:
You may be interested in this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Abolish seasonal clock changes & keep the UK on a fixed time all year-round
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765776
